title: Reset Password
content: Users can reset their password from Settings > Security.

title: Create Account
content: Users can create an account by clicking Sign Up on the login page.

title: Delete Account
content: Users can delete their account from Settings > Security > Delete Account.

title: Update Email
content: Users can update their email from Settings > Profile.

title: Change Username
content: Users can change their username from the profile settings page.

title: Change Username
content: Users can change their username from the profile settings page.
